source: reviewed legacy Grammar HTML functionality audit

capabilities.legacyCapability: 18 concepts, 51 deterministic templates and reviewed question-type split
Scored Grammar practice uses deterministic generators and marking
All eight legacy mode ids are visible and enabled
Concept status, misconception patterns, question-type evidence and recent activity
Grammar creature progress derives from secured learning evidence
AI stays in a non-scored enrichment lane
Grammar shows future transfer roadmap without collapsing Punctuation identity
KS2-style mini-test has fixed set size, timer, navigation, delayed feedback and end review
Session goal supports ten minutes, fifteen questions and clear due items
Smart Review teaching items and show-domain-before-answer are learner preferences
Learners can retry, show worked solution, request faded support and load a similar built-in problem
capabilities.reason: Current UI exposes worked/faded as modes but not as in-session repair actions.

capabilities.legacyCapability: Learners and adults can request explanation, revision cards and parent summary drafts
capabilities.reason: Current safe lane can render enrichment but lacks visible trigger workflows.

capabilities.legacyCapability: Grammar prompt, visible options and feedback can be read aloud at a learner-selected rate
capabilities.reason: Current Grammar UI has no speech synthesis affordance.

capabilities.legacyCapability: Profile/data/settings workflows are clearly replaced by platform persistence and adult evidence surfaces
capabilities.reason: Current platform has adult Grammar evidence, but the replacement boundary is not yet complete or documented.

capabilities.legacyCapability: Completeness claim is protected by tests, smoke coverage and documentation
capabilities.reason: Current tests prove the shipped Worker slice, not the full legacy functionality matrix.

capabilities.legacyCapability: Create, rename, delete, import, export and reset learner data inside the single HTML file
capabilities.replacement: Platform learner management, persistence, import/export and remote sync remain authoritative.

capabilities.legacyCapability: Single-file browser code owns scored Grammar state
capabilities.rationale: Production Grammar scoring, scheduling and mastery mutation must remain Worker-owned.

capabilities.legacyCapability: Learner enters and optionally stores provider API keys in the browser
capabilities.rationale: AI provider access must stay server-side; browser-held keys are not a production parity target.

capabilities.legacyCapability: The legacy HTML file can be opened directly as the product
capabilities.rationale: Production Grammar must run through the React subject surface and Worker command boundary.
